title: Hernienoperation – Behandlung & Ablauf | Hirslanden
heading: Operationen bei Bauchwandbrüchen (Hernien)

sections.heading: Operationen bei Bauchwandbrüchen (Hernien)
sections.summary: Page header zone containing breadcrumb navigation (3-level) with sibling dropdown for both 'Behandlungen' level and individual treatment level, a back-link ('← Behandlungen'), and the H1 title. No hero image — plain white/light header with title only.

Short bold lead paragraph summarising the treatment in 2–3 sentences. States that abdominal wall hernia operations are among the most common operations; inguinal, femoral, umbilical, and incision/scar hernias most often require surgery; the procedure closes the hernia opening and reinforces the muscle wall with a mesh; this is the only effective and permanent treatment.

Long-form medical editorial content (div.textAndImage > div.text). Structured with inline H3 subheadings covering: (1) anatomy and types of hernias and their symptoms; (2) Wie sieht die Vorbereitung vor der Operation aus? — pre-op routine tests; (3) Wie läuft die Operation ab? — two techniques (suture vs. mesh) and open vs. laparoscopic approach with CO2 detail; (4) Wie hoch ist der Therapieerfolg? — 1–2% recurrence rate; (5) Welche Risiken oder Komplikationen gibt es? — bleeding, nerve damage, infection, adhesions, rare testicular swelling in men; (6) Was passiert nach dem Eingriff? — 1–2 nights hospital stay, sport after 3–4 weeks. Includes one internal link to /de/corporate/behandlungen/reflux-operation.html (Hiatushernie cross-reference). No images.

sections.heading: Zentren (15)
sections.summary: Filterable list of 15 treatment centres offering this procedure. Layout: 2/3 main column. Filter controls: keyword typeahead input + city multiselect dropdown (Aarau, Basel, Bern, Biel, St. Gallen, Zürich) + 'Anwenden' button. Results rendered as badge cards showing: centre name (linked), address (street, postcode, city), phone number (linked tel:), email button, and optionally opening hours. Examples: Chirurgie Aarau, Chirurgie Baden, HernienZentrum Zürich (Kappelistrasse 41, 8027 Zürich), Viszeralchirurgie Beau-Site (Bern). Paginated: 10 initial results + 'Mehr anzeigen' load-more button. SEO-hidden pagination links present.

Sidebar column (1/3 width, grid-col-2). Filterable doctor list. For this page: 1 result. Displays a 'trust-card' with doctor portrait image (square, mediclinic.scene7.com CDN, 164×164px base), doctor name linked to profile, and a 'Medizinisch geprüft' (medically reviewed) badge with reviewer's name (Dr. med. Aris D'Ambrogio, linked to /de/corporate/aerzte/2/dr-aris-d-ambrogio.html). Doctor image: mediclinic.scene7.com/is/image/mediclinic/2101614-dr-med-aris-d-ambrogio:1-1 (responsive srcset at 1x/1.3x/1.5x/2x).
Events section (div.events.list.section) — present in markup but empty/no results for this treatment.
Medical library / publications section (div.publications.list.section) — present in markup but empty/no results for this treatment.

images.role: doctor-portrait — square crop, sidebar trust card
og:image fallback only — not rendered on page

templateSpecificData.metaDescription: Wie wird die Operation bei Hernien (Bauchwandbrüchen) durchgeführt? Hirslanden informiert über den Ablauf einer Hernienoperation.

procedure.indication: Hernien (Bauchwandbrüche): Inguinal-, Krural/Femoral-, Nabel- und Narben-/Inzisionshernien
procedureSteps: Pre-op routine tests: blood tests, blood pressure, ECG
Technique 1: suture closure of hernia opening
Technique 2 (preferred): mesh reinforcement of muscle wall (significantly lower recurrence 1–2%)
Access: open or laparoscopic (minimally invasive, CO2 insufflation)
Laparoscopic: camera and instruments via small incisions; mesh placed between peritoneum and abdominal wall, fixed with adhesive or tacks
CO2 aspirated and skin closed at end
procedure.duration: Ambulant/outpatient procedure; 1–2 nights hospital stay post-op
procedure.recovery: Sport and physical activity possible after 3–4 weeks; sick leave duration depends on occupation
procedure.risks: Bleeding, nerve damage, infection, adhesions (rare); temporary testicular swelling in men after inguinal hernia repair (rare); spermatic cord injury in extremely rare cases
procedure.anesthesia: General (Vollnarkose) mandatory for laparoscopic; open approach allows general or spinal (Teilnarkose/Spinalanästhesie)

layoutNotes: Two-column grid layout: main content (grid-col-1, ~66%) left; sidebar (grid-col-2, ~33%) right. The main column stacks: lead paragraph → rich text editorial with H3 subheadings → filterable centres list (with city filter + load-more). The sidebar contains the doctors list with trust card + 'Medizinisch geprüft' reviewer attribution. No hero image on this template — generic header with breadcrumb + H1 only. Empty events and publications list sections are rendered but invisible. The breadcrumb has a three-level structure with sibling dropdown menus at levels 2 and 3, effectively providing in-context navigation to all treatments. Back-link above H1 links back to the listing. Structured data (JSON-LD): MedicalTherapy + BreadcrumbList. Dev server (localhost:3000) 404s for all /de/corporate/behandlungen/* paths — content is not synced/proxied; analysis done directly against www.hirslanden.ch.
